---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the **use case** first — who
is doing what, and what's getting in their way today. Avoid jumping straight
to a proposed solution.

## Proposed solution

How would you like codekb to behave? CLI shape, config schema, output, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why you ruled them out.

## Scope

- [ ] Does this fit the MVP scope (C# repos, Postgres + pgvector, OpenAI /
      Azure OpenAI embeddings, CLI surface)?
- [ ] Does it require a new requirement in
      [docs/specs/codekb-mvp/requirements.md](../../docs/specs/codekb-mvp/requirements.md)?
- [ ] Does it cross a security or redaction boundary?

## Additional context

Links to similar features in other tools, prior discussions, screenshots, etc.
